zh.lifeSummary: 當Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh於大約1125年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏梅爾時，他的父親Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife38歲，母親Countess Constance Buchan46歲。他於1150年之前與Giles de Montgomery在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1160年登記服兵役。他於1163年被列為constable of inverness castle。他去世於1179年在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾配第。

zh-hans.Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰洛-爾易斯爾 本 劉易斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh于大约1125年出生在英国苏格兰費伏梅爾时，他的父亲Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife38岁，母亲Countess Constance Buchan46岁。他于1150年之前与Giles de Montgomery在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1160年登记服兵役。他于1163年被列为constable of inverness castle。他去世于1179年在英国苏格兰費伏享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾配第。

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Shaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name meaning ‘wood, copse’ (Old English sceaga, Old Norse skógr).

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a common nickname for bearers of any of the Scottish and Irish patronymic surnames beginning with Mac or Mc, this is now sometimes used as an independent first name, especially in the U.S.

nameMeanings.name: in
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Winifred   or   Winfred .

variants.name: Winifred
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh female personal name Gwenfrewi . The form of the name has been altered by association with   Winfred   and has been in general use among English speakers since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Toisich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Tomšič or Tomsič and Croatian Tomšić (see Tomsic ).

variants.name: Tomsic
meanings: Slovenian (Tomšič, Tomsič): patronymic from an old derivative of the personal name Tomaž (see Thomas ).
Croatian (Tomšić): patronymic from an old pet form of the personal name Toma (see Thomas ) or of its derivative Tomislav (see Tomic ). Compare Tomsich , Tomsick , and Tomasi 2.

en.lifeSummary: When Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh was born about 1125, in Methil, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, was 38 and his mother, Countess Constance Buchan, was 46. He married Giles de Montgomery before 1150, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1160. In 1163, at the age of 39, his occupation is listed as constable of inverness castle. He died in 1179, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh est né environ 1125, à Methil, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Countess Constance Buchan, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Giles de Montgomery avant 1150, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1160. En 1163, à l’âge de 39 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of inverness castle. Il est décédé en 1179, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Petty, Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.Methil, Fife, Scotland: Fyfe Shore, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh um 1125 in Methil, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife 38 und seine Mutter Countess Constance Buchan 46. Er hat vor 1150 in Fife, Scotland Giles de Montgomery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1160 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1163, als er 39 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of inverness castle aufgeführt. Er starb 1179 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh è nato il circa 1125 nel Methil, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Countess Constance Buchan, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Giles de Montgomery prima del 1150, nel Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1160. Nel 1163, all'età di 39 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of inverness castle. Morì nel 1179, nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintoshが約1125年にイギリススコットランドフィフメスイルで生まれた時，父Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fifeは38歳，母Countess Constance Buchanは46歳であった。1150年以前にスコットランドフィフでGiles de Montgomeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1160年に兵役登録をした。1163年，39歳の時，職業はconstable of inverness castleと記録されている。彼は1179年にイギリススコットランドフィフで55歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアペッティにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh(이)가 대략 1125년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 멧힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Constance Buchan(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1150년 이전 스컷랜드 피프에서 Giles de Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1160년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1163년, 39세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of inverness castle이었다. 그는 1179년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 페티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em Methil, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Countess Constance Buchan, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Giles de Montgomery antes 1150, em Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1160. Em 1163, com 39 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of inverness castle. Ele faleceu em 1179, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ro.Methil, Fife, Scotland: Fyfe Shore, Renfrewshire, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh родился около 1125 г. в местности метил, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Constance Buchan, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Giles de Montgomery перед 1150 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1160 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1163 году, в возрасте 39 лет, работал по профессии constable of inverness castle. Он умер в 1179 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности петти, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh nació aproximadamente 1125, en Methil, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Countess Constance Buchan, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Giles de Montgomery antes de 1150, en Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1160. En 1163, a la edad de 39 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of inverness castle. Murió en 1179, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland.
